title: AutoCount Plugin
description: AutoCount Accounting plugin collection including KSL-built plugins and selected dealer plugins.

plugins: Sales2DO (Built by KSL, KSL Business Solutions): Generate Delivery Orders directly from existing Invoices or Cash Sales, with smart quantity control for partial and fully delivered documents.

sections.heading: AutoCount Plugin
body: A curated library of AutoCount Accounting plugins used by KSL Business Solutions, separated by plugins built by our team and plugins supplied by other AutoCount dealers.
